languages.text: Скверна ксенотеха столь густо испещряет аугменты техножреца, словно Истинную Плоть поразила черная сыпь.

traits.locale_text: Скверна ксенотеха столь густо испещряет аугменты техножреца, словно Истинную Плоть поразила черная сыпь.

languages.text: The taint of xenotech riddles the Tech-Priest's augmetics so densely it is as if they have been marred with a black blight.
languages.original_text: Скверна ксенотеха столь густо испещряет аугменты техножреца, словно Истинную Плоть поразила черная сыпь.

traits.locale_text: The taint of xenotech riddles the Tech-Priest's augmetics so densely, as if the True Flesh itself has been marred with black blight.
The taint of xenotech riddles the Tech-Priest's augmetics so densely, as if the True Flesh itself has been marred with black blight.

The taint of xenotech riddles the Tech-Priest's augmetics so densely it is as if they have been marred with a black blight.

languages.text: La mancha de la xenotecnología contamina los auméticos del tecnosacerdote de forma tan completa que es como hubieran sufrido una mancha putrefacta.
languages.original_text: The taint of xenotech riddles the Tech-Priest's augmetics so densely it is as if they have been marred with a black blight.

traits.locale_text: La mancha de la xenotecnología contamina los auméticos del tecnosacerdote de forma tan completa que es como hubieran sufrido una mancha putrefacta.

languages.text: 异形科技的污秽如黑色疫病一般，深深侵蚀了这名技术神甫的植入物。
languages.original_text: The taint of xenotech riddles the Tech-Priest's augmetics so densely it is as if they have been marred with a black blight.

traits.locale_text: 异形科技的污秽如黑色疫病一般，深深侵蚀了这名技术神甫的植入物。

languages.text: La souillure de la xénotechnologie gangrène les augmétiques du technoprêtre, à tel point qu'ils semblent contaminés par un chancre occulte.
languages.original_text: The taint of xenotech riddles the Tech-Priest's augmetics so densely it is as if they have been marred with a black blight.

traits.locale_text: La souillure de la xénotechnologie gangrène les augmétiques du technoprêtre, à tel point qu'ils semblent contaminés par un chancre occulte.

languages.text: Zeno teknolojisi lekesi, Tekno Rahip'in ogmetiklerini yoğun bir şekilde delik deşik etmiş. Öyle ki sanki kara bir afetle lekelenmiş gibi.
languages.original_text: The taint of xenotech riddles the Tech-Priest's augmetics so densely it is as if they have been marred with a black blight.

traits.locale_text: Zeno teknolojisi lekesi, Tekno Rahip'in ogmetiklerini yoğun bir şekilde delik deşik etmiş. Öyle ki sanki kara bir afetle lekelenmiş gibi.

languages.text: 異星技術の汚染が技術司祭のオーグメティックを密に蝕んでおり、まるで黒い枯病に冒されたかのようだ。
languages.original_text: The taint of xenotech riddles the Tech-Priest's augmetics so densely it is as if they have been marred with a black blight.

traits.locale_text: 異星技術の汚染が技術司祭のオーグメティックを密に蝕んでおり、まるで黒い枯病に冒されたかのようだ。

languages.text: Der Makel der Xenotech hat die Augmentation so stark befallen, dass es scheint, als wären sie selbst von einer schwarzen Pest entstellt.
languages.original_text: The taint of xenotech riddles the Tech-Priest's augmetics so densely it is as if they have been marred with a black blight.

traits.locale_text: Der Makel der Xenotech hat die Augmentation so stark befallen, dass es scheint, als wären sie selbst von einer schwarzen Pest entstellt.
